# EPV Analysis
## Row 1
```{r EPV time plot}
#set final plot data frame

#EPV over time line plot Opta data
#data wrangling
EPVPlotData <- plottingData

EPVPlotData <- EPVPlotData %>%
  filter(teamId == Match_LFC) %>%
  filter(!Own_Goals == 1) %>%
  mutate(isGoal = ifelse(type == "Goal", 1, 0)) %>%
  mutate(Home_Cumalative_EPV = cumsum(EPVvalue)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_X = ifelse(str_detect(Goals, "1"), paste0(expandedMinute), NA)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_Y = ifelse(str_detect(Goals, "1"), paste0(Home_Cumalative_EPV), NA)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_X = as.numeric(Goal_point_X)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_Y = as.numeric(Goal_point_Y),
         Home_Cumalative_EPV = round(Home_Cumalative_EPV,2))

EPVTimePlot <- EPVPlotData %>%
    
#canvas
  ggplot(aes(x = expandedMinute, y = Home_Cumalative_EPV)) +
  
#geometrics
#  geom_smooth(size = 1.5, colour = Color_LFC) +
  geom_line(size = 1.5, colour = Color_LFC) +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = max(Home_Cumalative_EPV), x = 45, xend = 45), linewidth = 0.8, colour = "black", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_text(aes(x = 45, y = max(Home_Cumalative_EPV), label = "HT"), colour = "black", hjust = 1.5, vjust = 1, size = 4) +
  geom_image(inherit.aes = FALSE, mapping = aes(x = Goal_point_X, y = Goal_point_Y, image = "~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/Icons/ball2.png"), size = 0.03) +
  geom_label_repel(aes(x = Goal_point_X, y = Goal_point_Y, label = paste0(type, "\nMin:", minute)), size = 4) +
  
#formatting
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, 15)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 4, 0.5)) +
  labs(title = paste(Match_LFC, " EPV Development"),
         subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture),
         x = "Match time (Mins)",
         caption = My_caption,
         y = "EPV") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        panel.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 12),
        axis.title.y = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(colour = "black", size = 8),
        axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "black", size = 8),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "#454545", linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dashed"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

EPVTimePlot

#EPVTimePlot_I <- ggplotly(EPVTimePlot, tooltip = "text")
#EPVTimePlot_I
```

```{r EPV OPPO}
OppoEPVPlotData <- plottingData

OppoEPVPlotData <- OppoEPVPlotData %>%
  filter(teamId == Match_Oppo) %>%
  filter(!Own_Goals == 1) %>%
  mutate(isGoal = ifelse(type == "Goal", 1, 0)) %>%
  mutate(Away_Cumalative_EPV = cumsum(EPVvalue)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_X = ifelse(str_detect(Goals, "1"), paste0(expandedMinute), NA)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_Y = ifelse(str_detect(Goals, "1"), paste0(Away_Cumalative_EPV), NA)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_X = as.numeric(Goal_point_X)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_Y = as.numeric(Goal_point_Y),
         Away_Cumalative_EPV = round(Away_Cumalative_EPV,2))

#set final plot data frame
OppoEPVTimePlot <- OppoEPVPlotData %>%
  
  #canvas
  ggplot(aes(x = expandedMinute, y = Away_Cumalative_EPV)) +
  
  #geometrics
#  geom_smooth(size = 1.5, colour = Color_Oppo) +
  geom_line(size = 1.5, colour = Color_Oppo) +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = max(Away_Cumalative_EPV), x = 45, xend = 45), linewidth = 0.8, colour = "black", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_text(aes(x = 45, y = max(Away_Cumalative_EPV), label = "HT"), colour = "black", hjust = 1.5, vjust = 1, size = 4) +
  geom_image(inherit.aes = FALSE, mapping = aes(x = Goal_point_X, y = Goal_point_Y, image = "~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/Icons/ball2.png"), size = 0.025) +
  geom_label_repel(aes(x = Goal_point_X, y = Goal_point_Y, label = paste0(type, "\nMin:", minute)), size = 4) +
  
  #formatting
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, 15)) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 4, 0.5)) +
  labs( title = paste0(Match_Oppo, " EPV Development"),
         subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture),
         caption = My_caption,
         x = "Match time (Mins)",
         y = "EPV") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        panel.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 12),
        axis.title.y = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(colour = "black", size = 8),
        axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "black", size = 8),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "#454545", linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dashed"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
OppoEPVTimePlot

#OppoEPVTimePlot_I <- ggplotly(OppoEPVTimePlot, tooltip = "text")
#OppoEPVTimePlot_I

```


## Row 2
```{r EPV area}
#EPV Development area  plot Opta data
#data wrangling
EPVAreaPlotData <- plottingData

EPVAreaPlotData <- EPVAreaPlotData %>%
  filter(teamId == Match_LFC)

#set final plot data frame
EPVAreaPlotData <- EPVAreaPlotData %>%
  group_by(expandedMinute) %>%
  filter(!Own_Goals == 1) %>%
  mutate(isGoal = ifelse(type == "Goal", 1, 0)) %>%
  mutate(EPVArea = sum(EPVvalue)) %>%
  mutate(EPVArea = as.numeric(EPVArea),
         EPVArea = round(EPVArea,2)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_X = ifelse(str_detect(isGoal, "1"), paste0(expandedMinute), NA)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_Y = ifelse(str_detect(isGoal, "1"), paste0(EPVArea), NA)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_X = as.numeric(Goal_point_X)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_Y = as.numeric(Goal_point_Y))

  
#canvas
EPVAreaPlot <- EPVAreaPlotData %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = expandedMinute, y = EPVArea)) +
  
#geometrics
  geom_line(size = 1, colour = "black") +
  geom_area(fill = Color_LFC) +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = max(EPVArea), x = 45, xend = 45), linewidth = 0.8, colour = "black", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_text(aes(x = 45, y = max(EPVArea), label = "HT"), colour = "black", hjust = 1.5, vjust = 1, size = 4) +
  geom_image(inherit.aes = FALSE, mapping = aes(x = Goal_point_X, y = Goal_point_Y, image = "~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/Icons/ball2.png"), size = 0.03) +
  geom_label_repel(aes(x = Goal_point_X, y = Goal_point_Y, label = paste0("Game Min:", minute, " ", type, "\nEPV:", Goal_point_Y)), size = 4) +

  #formatting
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, 15)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 0.08, 0.02)) +
  labs(title = paste(Match_LFC, " EPV Development"),
         subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture),
         x = "Match Time (mins)",
         caption = My_caption,
         y = "EPV") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 12),
        axis.title.y = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(colour = "black", size = 8),
        axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "black", size = 8),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "#454545", linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dashed"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
EPVAreaPlot
```

```{r EVP Oppo}
#Oppo EPV Development area  plot Opta data
#data wrangling
OppoEPVAreaPlotData <- plottingData

OppoEPVAreaPlotData <- OppoEPVAreaPlotData %>%
  filter(teamId == Match_Oppo)

#set final plot data frame
OppoEPVAreaPlotData <- OppoEPVAreaPlotData %>%
  group_by(expandedMinute) %>%
  filter(!Own_Goals == 1) %>%
  mutate(isGoal = ifelse(type == "Goal", 1, 0)) %>%
  mutate(EPVArea = sum(EPVvalue)) %>%
  mutate(EPVArea = as.numeric(EPVArea),
         EPVArea = round(EPVArea,2)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_X = ifelse(str_detect(isGoal, "1"), paste0(expandedMinute), NA)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_Y = ifelse(str_detect(isGoal, "1"), paste0(EPVArea), NA)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_X = as.numeric(Goal_point_X)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_Y = as.numeric(Goal_point_Y))


#canvas
OppoEPVAreaPlot <- OppoEPVAreaPlotData %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = expandedMinute, y = EPVArea)) +
  
  #geometrics
  geom_line(size = 1, colour = "black") +
  geom_area(fill = Color_Oppo) +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = max(EPVArea), x = 45, xend = 45), linewidth = 0.8, colour = "black", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_text(aes(x = 45, y = max(EPVArea), label = "HT"), colour = "black", hjust = 1.5, vjust = 1, size = 4) +
  geom_image(inherit.aes = FALSE, mapping = aes(x = Goal_point_X, y = Goal_point_Y, image = "~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/Icons/ball2.png"), size = 0.025) +
  geom_label_repel(aes(x = Goal_point_X, y = Goal_point_Y, label = paste0("Game Min:", minute, " ", type, "\nEPV:", Goal_point_Y)), size = 4) +

  #formatting
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, 15)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 0.08, 0.02)) +
  labs( title = paste0(Match_Oppo, " EPV Development"),
         subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture),
         x = "Match Time (mins)",
         caption = My_caption,
         y = "EPV") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 12),
        axis.title.y = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(colour = "black", size = 8),
        axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "black", size = 8),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "#454545", linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dashed"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
OppoEPVAreaPlot

```

## Row 3

``` {r}  

EPVHeatMapData <- plottingData %>%
  filter(teamId == Match_LFC) %>%
  filter(!`qualifiers/0/type/value` == 2, 
         !`qualifiers/0/type/value` == 6, #corner
         !`qualifiers/0/type/value` == 5, #free kick
         !`qualifiers/0/type/value` == 107, #throw in
         !`qualifiers/1/type/value` == 2, 
         !`qualifiers/1/type/value` == 6,
         !`qualifiers/1/type/value` == 5,
         !`qualifiers/1/type/value` == 107,
         !`qualifiers/2/type/value` == 2, 
         !`qualifiers/2/type/value` == 6,
         !`qualifiers/2/type/value` == 5,
         !`qualifiers/2/type/value` == 107,
         !`qualifiers/3/type/value` == 2, 
         !`qualifiers/3/type/value` == 6,
         !`qualifiers/3/type/value` == 5,
         !`qualifiers/3/type/value` == 107,
         `type/value` == 1 & `outcomeType/value` == 1 |
           `type/value` == 2 & `outcomeType/value` == 1 | 
           `type/value` == 3 & `outcomeType/value` == 1 |
           `type/value` == 4 & `outcomeType/value` == 1 |
           `type/value` == 9 |
           `type/value` == 7 |
           `type/value` == 8 |
           `type/value` == 10 |
           `type/value` == 11 |
           `type/value` == 12 |
           `type/value` == 13 |
           `type/value` == 14 |
           `type/value` == 15 |
           `type/value` == 16 |
           `type/value` == 41 |
           `type/value` == 44 |
           `type/value` == 42 |
           `type/value` == 45 |
           `type/value` == 50 |
           `type/value` == 52 |
           `type/value` == 54 |
           `type/value` == 61 |
           `type/value` == 73 |
           `type/value` == 74)

#set time period
EPVHeatMapDataFT <- EPVHeatMapData

#set EPV total for time period
HomeEPVFT <- sum(EPVHeatMapDataFT$EPVvalue)

# Create a new variable to represent the zone for each observation
EPVHeatMapDataFT$zone_x <- cut(EPVHeatMapDataFT$x, breaks = c(0, 17, 33.2, 50, 66.4, 83, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)
EPVHeatMapDataFT$zone_y <- cut(EPVHeatMapDataFT$y, breaks = c(0, 21.1, 36.8, 63.2, 78.9, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)

# Calculate average EPV for each zone
average_epvFT <- EPVHeatMapDataFT %>%
  group_by(zone_x, zone_y) %>%
  summarize(avg_epv = sum(EPVvalue, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(avg_epv = round(ifelse(avg_epv < 0, abs(avg_epv), avg_epv), 3),
         PEPV = round(avg_epv/HomeEPVFT,3)) 

# Plot the tile plot
EPVMapplotFT <- ggplot(average_epvFT, aes(x = zone_x, y = zone_y, fill = avg_epv)) +
  theme_pitch() +
  
  #geometrics
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = PEPV, size = 3)) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_HomeC) +

  #formatting
  labs(title = "LFC Open Play EPV Heat Map - Full Game", 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher EPV, \nBox figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

#calculate for combined tile and heat map
average_epvNZFT <- average_epvFT %>%
  mutate(x = ifelse(zone_x == "[0,17]", 8.5,
                    ifelse(zone_x == "(17,33.2]", 25.1,
                           ifelse(zone_x == "(33.2,50]", 41.6,
                                  ifelse(zone_x == "(50,66.4]", 58.2,
                                         ifelse(zone_x == "(66.4,83]", 74.7,
                                                ifelse(zone_x == "(83,100]", 91.5, NA))))))) %>%
  mutate(y = ifelse(zone_y == "[0,21.1]", 10,
                    ifelse(zone_y == "(21.1,36.8]", 30,
                           ifelse(zone_y == "(36.8,63.2]", 50,
                                  ifelse(zone_y == "(63.2,78.9]", 70,
                                         ifelse(zone_y == "(78.9,100]", 90, NA))))))

average_epvNZFT <- average_epvNZFT %>%
  group_by(x, y) %>%
  summarise(avg_epv = sum(avg_epv, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(PEPV = 100*(round(avg_epv/HomeEPVFT,2)))  


EPVHeatMapplotFT <- EPVHeatMapDataFT %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_opta, fill = "#E5E5E5", colour = "#454545") +
  theme_pitch() +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 21.1, yend = 21.1, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 36.8, yend = 36.8, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 63.2, yend = 63.2, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 78.9, yend = 78.9, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 17, xend = 17), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 33.2, xend = 33.2), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 50, xend = 50), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 66.4, xend = 66.4), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 83, xend = 83), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  
  # add zone percentage numbers
  geom_text(data = average_epvNZFT, aes(x = x, y = y, label = paste(PEPV, "%")), size = 4) +
  
  #geometrics
  stat_density_2d_filled(aes(level = EPV, fill = after_stat(level)), alpha = 0.8, adjust = 0.1, linewidth = 2) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Home) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = "LFC Open Play EPV Heat Map - Full Game", 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher \nEPV, Box figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  My_caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

EPVHeatMapplotFT

#EPVHeatMapplotFT_I <- ggplotly(EPVHeatMapplotFT)
#EPVHeatMapplotFT_I
################################################################
```

``` {r}
#Oppo EPV heat plots

OppoEPVHeatMapData <- plottingData %>%
  filter(teamId == Match_Oppo) %>%
  filter(!`qualifiers/0/type/value` == 2, 
         !`qualifiers/0/type/value` == 6, #corner
         !`qualifiers/0/type/value` == 5, #free kick
         !`qualifiers/0/type/value` == 107, #throw in
         !`qualifiers/1/type/value` == 2, 
         !`qualifiers/1/type/value` == 6,
         !`qualifiers/1/type/value` == 5,
         !`qualifiers/1/type/value` == 107,
         !`qualifiers/2/type/value` == 2, 
         !`qualifiers/2/type/value` == 6,
         !`qualifiers/2/type/value` == 5,
         !`qualifiers/2/type/value` == 107,
         !`qualifiers/3/type/value` == 2, 
         !`qualifiers/3/type/value` == 6,
         !`qualifiers/3/type/value` == 5,
         !`qualifiers/3/type/value` == 107,
         `type/value` == 1 & `outcomeType/value` == 1 |
           `type/value` == 2 & `outcomeType/value` == 1 | 
           `type/value` == 3 & `outcomeType/value` == 1 |
           `type/value` == 4 & `outcomeType/value` == 1 |
           `type/value` == 9 |
           `type/value` == 7 |
           `type/value` == 8 |
           `type/value` == 10 |
           `type/value` == 11 |
           `type/value` == 12 |
           `type/value` == 13 |
           `type/value` == 14 |
           `type/value` == 15 |
           `type/value` == 16 |
           `type/value` == 41 |
           `type/value` == 44 |
           `type/value` == 42 |
           `type/value` == 45 |
           `type/value` == 50 |
           `type/value` == 52 |
           `type/value` == 54 |
           `type/value` == 61 |
           `type/value` == 73 |
           `type/value` == 74)

#set for time period
OppoEPVHeatMapDataFT <- OppoEPVHeatMapData

#set EPV total for time period
OppoEPVFT <- sum(OppoEPVHeatMapDataFT$EPVvalue)


# Create a new variable to represent the zone for each observation
OppoEPVHeatMapDataFT$zone_x <- cut(OppoEPVHeatMapDataFT$x, breaks = c(0, 17, 33.2, 50, 66.4, 83, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)
OppoEPVHeatMapDataFT$zone_y <- cut(OppoEPVHeatMapDataFT$y, breaks = c(0, 21.1, 36.8, 63.2, 78.9, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)

# Calculate average EPV for each zone
Oppoaverage_epvFT <- OppoEPVHeatMapDataFT %>%
  group_by(zone_x, zone_y) %>%
  summarize(avg_epv = sum(EPVvalue, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(avg_epv = round(ifelse(avg_epv < 0, abs(avg_epv), avg_epv), 3),
         PEPV = round(avg_epv/OppoEPVFT,3)) 

# Plot the tile plot
OppoEPVMapplotFT <- ggplot(Oppoaverage_epvFT, aes(x = zone_x, y = zone_y, fill = avg_epv)) +
  theme_pitch() +
  
  #geometrics
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = PEPV, size = 3)) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_AwayC) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = paste(Match_Oppo," Open Play EPV Heat Map - Full Game"), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher EPV, \nBox figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

#OppoEPVMapplotFT

#save tile Map plot
#ggsave("Oppo Open Play EPV Tile Map FT.png", width = 2500, height = 2150, units = "px", dpi = 400)


#calculate for combined tile and heat map
Oppoaverage_epvNZFT <- Oppoaverage_epvFT %>%
  mutate(x = ifelse(zone_x == "[0,17]", 8.5,
                    ifelse(zone_x == "(17,33.2]", 25.1,
                           ifelse(zone_x == "(33.2,50]", 41.6,
                                  ifelse(zone_x == "(50,66.4]", 58.2,
                                         ifelse(zone_x == "(66.4,83]", 74.7,
                                                ifelse(zone_x == "(83,100]", 91.5, NA))))))) %>%
  mutate(y = ifelse(zone_y == "[0,21.1]", 10,
                    ifelse(zone_y == "(21.1,36.8]", 30,
                           ifelse(zone_y == "(36.8,63.2]", 50,
                                  ifelse(zone_y == "(63.2,78.9]", 70,
                                         ifelse(zone_y == "(78.9,100]", 90, NA))))))

Oppoaverage_epvNZFT <- Oppoaverage_epvNZFT %>%
  group_by(x, y) %>%
  summarise(avg_epv = sum(avg_epv, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(PEPV = 100*(round(avg_epv/OppoEPVFT,2)))  


OppoEPVHeatMapplotFT <- OppoEPVHeatMapDataFT %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_opta, fill = "#E5E5E5", colour = "#454545") +
  theme_pitch() +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 21.1, yend = 21.1, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 36.8, yend = 36.8, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 63.2, yend = 63.2, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 78.9, yend = 78.9, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 17, xend = 17), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 33.2, xend = 33.2), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 50, xend = 50), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 66.4, xend = 66.4), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 83, xend = 83), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  
  # add zone percentage numbers
  geom_text(data = Oppoaverage_epvNZFT, aes(x = x, y = y, label = paste(PEPV, "%")), size = 4) +
  
  #geometrics
  stat_density_2d_filled(aes(level = EPV, fill = after_stat(level)), alpha = 0.8, adjust = 0.1, linewidth = 2) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Away) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = paste(Match_Oppo," Open Play EPV Heat Map - Full Game"), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher \nEPV, Box figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  My_caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

OppoEPVHeatMapplotFT

```


## Row 4

``` {r} 
#up to first subs map
#set time period
EPVHeatMapData1sub <- EPVHeatMapData %>%
  filter(minute <= firstSub)

#set EPV total for time period
HomeEPV1sub <- sum(EPVHeatMapData1sub$EPVvalue)

# Create a new variable to represent the zone for each observation
EPVHeatMapData1sub$zone_x <- cut(EPVHeatMapData1sub$x, breaks = c(0, 17, 33.2, 50, 66.4, 83, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)
EPVHeatMapData1sub$zone_y <- cut(EPVHeatMapData1sub$y, breaks = c(0, 21.1, 36.8, 63.2, 78.9, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)

# Calculate average EPV for each zone
average_epv1sub <- EPVHeatMapData1sub %>%
  group_by(zone_x, zone_y) %>%
  summarize(avg_epv = sum(EPVvalue, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(avg_epv = round(ifelse(avg_epv < 0, abs(avg_epv), avg_epv), 3),
         PEPV = round(avg_epv/HomeEPV1sub,3)) 

# Plot the tile plot
EPVMapplot1sub <- ggplot(average_epv1sub, aes(x = zone_x, y = zone_y, fill = avg_epv)) +
  theme_pitch() +
  
  #geometrics
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = PEPV, size = 3)) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_HomeC) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = "LFC Open Play EPV Heat Map - Up to first subs", 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher EPV, \nBox figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  My_caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

#calculate for combined tile and heat map
average_epvNZ1sub <- average_epv1sub %>%
  mutate(x = ifelse(zone_x == "[0,17]", 8.5,
                    ifelse(zone_x == "(17,33.2]", 25.1,
                           ifelse(zone_x == "(33.2,50]", 41.6,
                                  ifelse(zone_x == "(50,66.4]", 58.2,
                                         ifelse(zone_x == "(66.4,83]", 74.7,
                                                ifelse(zone_x == "(83,100]", 91.5, NA))))))) %>%
  mutate(y = ifelse(zone_y == "[0,21.1]", 10,
                    ifelse(zone_y == "(21.1,36.8]", 30,
                           ifelse(zone_y == "(36.8,63.2]", 50,
                                  ifelse(zone_y == "(63.2,78.9]", 70,
                                         ifelse(zone_y == "(78.9,100]", 90, NA))))))

average_epvNZ1sub <- average_epvNZ1sub %>%
  group_by(x, y) %>%
  summarise(avg_epv = sum(avg_epv, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(PEPV = 100*(round(avg_epv/HomeEPV1sub,2)))  


EPVHeatMapplot1sub <- EPVHeatMapData1sub %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_opta, fill = "#E5E5E5", colour = "#454545") +
  theme_pitch() +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 21.1, yend = 21.1, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 36.8, yend = 36.8, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 63.2, yend = 63.2, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 78.9, yend = 78.9, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 17, xend = 17), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 33.2, xend = 33.2), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 50, xend = 50), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 66.4, xend = 66.4), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 83, xend = 83), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  
  # add zone percentage numbers
  geom_text(data = average_epvNZ1sub, aes(x = x, y = y, label = paste(PEPV, "%")), size = 4) +
  
  #geometrics
  stat_density_2d_filled(aes(level = EPV, fill = after_stat(level)), alpha = 0.8, adjust = 0.1, linewidth = 2) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Home) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = "LFC Open Play EPV Heat Map - Up to first subs", 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher \nEPV, Box figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  My_caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

EPVHeatMapplot1sub

################################################################

```

``` {r} 
#Post first subs map
#set time period
EPVHeatMapDataP1sub <- EPVHeatMapData %>%
  filter(minute > firstSub)

#set EPV total for time period
HomeEPVP1sub <- sum(EPVHeatMapDataP1sub$EPVvalue)

# Create a new variable to represent the zone for each observation
EPVHeatMapDataP1sub$zone_x <- cut(EPVHeatMapDataP1sub$x, breaks = c(0, 17, 33.2, 50, 66.4, 83, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)
EPVHeatMapDataP1sub$zone_y <- cut(EPVHeatMapDataP1sub$y, breaks = c(0, 21.1, 36.8, 63.2, 78.9, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)

# Calculate average EPV for each zone
average_epvP1sub <- EPVHeatMapDataP1sub %>%
  group_by(zone_x, zone_y) %>%
  summarize(avg_epv = sum(EPVvalue, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(avg_epv = round(ifelse(avg_epv < 0, abs(avg_epv), avg_epv), 3),
         PEPV = round(avg_epv/HomeEPVP1sub,3)) 

# Plot the tile plot
EPVMapplotP1sub <- ggplot(average_epvP1sub, aes(x = zone_x, y = zone_y, fill = avg_epv)) +
  theme_pitch() +
  
  #geometrics
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = PEPV, size = 3)) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_HomeC) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = "LFC Open Play EPV Heat Map - Post First subs", 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher EPV, \nBox figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  My_caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))


#calculate for combined tile and heat map
average_epvNZP1sub <- average_epvP1sub %>%
  mutate(x = ifelse(zone_x == "[0,17]", 8.5,
                    ifelse(zone_x == "(17,33.2]", 25.1,
                           ifelse(zone_x == "(33.2,50]", 41.6,
                                  ifelse(zone_x == "(50,66.4]", 58.2,
                                         ifelse(zone_x == "(66.4,83]", 74.7,
                                                ifelse(zone_x == "(83,100]", 91.5, NA))))))) %>%
  mutate(y = ifelse(zone_y == "[0,21.1]", 10,
                    ifelse(zone_y == "(21.1,36.8]", 30,
                           ifelse(zone_y == "(36.8,63.2]", 50,
                                  ifelse(zone_y == "(63.2,78.9]", 70,
                                         ifelse(zone_y == "(78.9,100]", 90, NA))))))

average_epvNZP1sub <- average_epvNZP1sub %>%
  group_by(x, y) %>%
  summarise(avg_epv = sum(avg_epv, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(PEPV = 100*(round(avg_epv/HomeEPVP1sub,2)))  


EPVHeatMapplotP1sub <- EPVHeatMapDataP1sub %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_opta, fill = "#E5E5E5", colour = "#454545") +
  theme_pitch() +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 21.1, yend = 21.1, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 36.8, yend = 36.8, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 63.2, yend = 63.2, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 78.9, yend = 78.9, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 17, xend = 17), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 33.2, xend = 33.2), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 50, xend = 50), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 66.4, xend = 66.4), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 83, xend = 83), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  
  # add zone percentage numbers
  geom_text(data = average_epvNZP1sub, aes(x = x, y = y, label = paste(PEPV, "%")), size = 4) +
  
  #geometrics
  stat_density_2d_filled(aes(level = EPV, fill = after_stat(level)), alpha = 0.8, adjust = 0.1, linewidth = 2) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Home) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = "LFC Open Play EPV Heat Map - Post First Subs", 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher \nEPV, Box figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  My_caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

EPVHeatMapplotP1sub


########################################################
```

``` {r}
#first subs
#set for time period
OppoEPVHeatMapData1sub <- OppoEPVHeatMapData %>%
  filter(minute <= firstSubOppo)

#set EPV total for time period
OppoEPV1sub <- sum(OppoEPVHeatMapData1sub$EPVvalue)


# Create a new variable to represent the zone for each observation
OppoEPVHeatMapData1sub$zone_x <- cut(OppoEPVHeatMapData1sub$x, breaks = c(0, 17, 33.2, 50, 66.4, 83, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)
OppoEPVHeatMapData1sub$zone_y <- cut(OppoEPVHeatMapData1sub$y, breaks = c(0, 21.1, 36.8, 63.2, 78.9, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)

# Calculate average EPV for each zone
Oppoaverage_epv1sub <- OppoEPVHeatMapData1sub %>%
  group_by(zone_x, zone_y) %>%
  summarize(avg_epv = sum(EPVvalue, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(avg_epv = round(ifelse(avg_epv < 0, abs(avg_epv), avg_epv), 3),
         PEPV = round(avg_epv/OppoEPV1sub,3)) 

# Plot the tile plot
OppoEPVMapplot1sub <- ggplot(Oppoaverage_epv1sub, aes(x = zone_x, y = zone_y, fill = avg_epv)) +
  theme_pitch() +
  
  #geometrics
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = PEPV, size = 3)) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_AwayC) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = paste(Match_Oppo," Open Play EPV Heat Map - Up to 1st Subs"), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher EPV, \nBox figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

#OppoEPVMapplot1sub

#save tile Map plot
#ggsave("Oppo Open Play EPV Tile Map 1st subs.png", width = 2500, height = 2150, units = "px", dpi = 400)


#calculate for combined tile and heat map
Oppoaverage_epvNZ1sub <- Oppoaverage_epv1sub %>%
  mutate(x = ifelse(zone_x == "[0,17]", 8.5,
                    ifelse(zone_x == "(17,33.2]", 25.1,
                           ifelse(zone_x == "(33.2,50]", 41.6,
                                  ifelse(zone_x == "(50,66.4]", 58.2,
                                         ifelse(zone_x == "(66.4,83]", 74.7,
                                                ifelse(zone_x == "(83,100]", 91.5, NA))))))) %>%
  mutate(y = ifelse(zone_y == "[0,21.1]", 10,
                    ifelse(zone_y == "(21.1,36.8]", 30,
                           ifelse(zone_y == "(36.8,63.2]", 50,
                                  ifelse(zone_y == "(63.2,78.9]", 70,
                                         ifelse(zone_y == "(78.9,100]", 90, NA))))))

Oppoaverage_epvNZ1sub <- Oppoaverage_epvNZ1sub %>%
  group_by(x, y) %>%
  summarise(avg_epv = sum(avg_epv, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(PEPV = 100*(round(avg_epv/OppoEPV1sub,2)))  


OppoEPVHeatMapplot1sub <- OppoEPVHeatMapData1sub %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_opta, fill = "#E5E5E5", colour = "#454545") +
  theme_pitch() +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 21.1, yend = 21.1, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 36.8, yend = 36.8, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 63.2, yend = 63.2, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 78.9, yend = 78.9, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 17, xend = 17), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 33.2, xend = 33.2), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 50, xend = 50), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 66.4, xend = 66.4), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 83, xend = 83), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  
  # add zone percentage numbers
  geom_text(data = Oppoaverage_epvNZ1sub, aes(x = x, y = y, label = paste(PEPV, "%")), size = 4) +
  
  #geometrics
  stat_density_2d_filled(aes(level = EPV, fill = after_stat(level)), alpha = 0.8, adjust = 0.1, linewidth = 2) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Away) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = paste(Match_Oppo," Open Play EPV Heat Map - Up to 1st Subs"), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher \nEPV, Box figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  My_caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))
```

``` {r}
#post first subs

OppoEPVHeatMapDataP1sub <- OppoEPVHeatMapData %>%
  filter(minute > firstSubOppo)

#set EPV total for time period
OppoEPVP1sub <- sum(OppoEPVHeatMapDataP1sub$EPVvalue)


# Create a new variable to represent the zone for each observation
OppoEPVHeatMapDataP1sub$zone_x <- cut(OppoEPVHeatMapDataP1sub$x, breaks = c(0, 17, 33.2, 50, 66.4, 83, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)
OppoEPVHeatMapDataP1sub$zone_y <- cut(OppoEPVHeatMapDataP1sub$y, breaks = c(0, 21.1, 36.8, 63.2, 78.9, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)

# Calculate average EPV for each zone
Oppoaverage_epvP1sub <- OppoEPVHeatMapDataP1sub %>%
  group_by(zone_x, zone_y) %>%
  summarize(avg_epv = sum(EPVvalue, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(avg_epv = round(ifelse(avg_epv < 0, abs(avg_epv), avg_epv), 3),
         PEPV = round(avg_epv/OppoEPVP1sub,3)) 

# Plot the tile plot
OppoEPVMapplotP1sub <- ggplot(Oppoaverage_epvP1sub, aes(x = zone_x, y = zone_y, fill = avg_epv)) +
  theme_pitch() +
  
  #geometrics
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = PEPV, size = 3)) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_AwayC) +
  
  #formatting

       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher EPV, \nBox figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),

  mutate(x = ifelse(zone_x == "[0,17]", 8.5,
                    ifelse(zone_x == "(17,33.2]", 25.1,
                           ifelse(zone_x == "(33.2,50]", 41.6,
                                  ifelse(zone_x == "(50,66.4]", 58.2,
                                         ifelse(zone_x == "(66.4,83]", 74.7,
                                                ifelse(zone_x == "(83,100]", 91.5, NA))))))) %>%
  mutate(y = ifelse(zone_y == "[0,21.1]", 10,
                    ifelse(zone_y == "(21.1,36.8]", 30,
                           ifelse(zone_y == "(36.8,63.2]", 50,
                                  ifelse(zone_y == "(63.2,78.9]", 70,
                                         ifelse(zone_y == "(78.9,100]", 90, NA))))))

Oppoaverage_epvNZP1sub <- Oppoaverage_epvNZP1sub %>%
  group_by(x, y) %>%
  summarise(avg_epv = sum(avg_epv, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(PEPV = 100*(round(avg_epv/OppoEPVP1sub,2)))  


OppoEPVHeatMapplotP1sub <- OppoEPVHeatMapDataP1sub %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_opta, fill = "#E5E5E5", colour = "#454545") +
  theme_pitch() +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 21.1, yend = 21.1, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 36.8, yend = 36.8, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 63.2, yend = 63.2, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 78.9, yend = 78.9, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +

  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 83, xend = 83), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  
  # add zone percentage numbers
  geom_text(data = Oppoaverage_epvNZP1sub, aes(x = x, y = y, label = paste(PEPV, "%")), size = 4) +
  
  #geometrics

  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Away) +
  
  #formatting
```

``` {r} 
#first half EPV Mao
#set time period
EPVHeatMapData1H <- EPVHeatMapData %>%
  filter(period == 1)

#set EPV total for time period
HomeEPV1H <- sum(EPVHeatMapData1H$EPVvalue)

# Create a new variable to represent the zone for each observation
EPVHeatMapData1H$zone_x <- cut(EPVHeatMapData1H$x, breaks = c(0, 17, 33.2, 50, 66.4, 83, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)
EPVHeatMapData1H$zone_y <- cut(EPVHeatMapData1H$y, breaks = c(0, 21.1, 36.8, 63.2, 78.9, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)

# Calculate average EPV for each zone
average_epv1H <- EPVHeatMapData1H %>%
  group_by(zone_x, zone_y) %>%
  summarize(avg_epv = sum(EPVvalue, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(avg_epv = round(ifelse(avg_epv < 0, abs(avg_epv), avg_epv), 3),
         PEPV = round(avg_epv/HomeEPV1H,3)) 

#calculate for combined tile and heat map
average_epvNZ1H <- average_epv1H %>%
  mutate(x = ifelse(zone_x == "[0,17]", 8.5,
                    ifelse(zone_x == "(17,33.2]", 25.1,
                           ifelse(zone_x == "(33.2,50]", 41.6,
                                  ifelse(zone_x == "(50,66.4]", 58.2,
                                         ifelse(zone_x == "(66.4,83]", 74.7,
                                                ifelse(zone_x == "(83,100]", 91.5, NA))))))) %>%
  mutate(y = ifelse(zone_y == "[0,21.1]", 10,
                    ifelse(zone_y == "(21.1,36.8]", 30,
                           ifelse(zone_y == "(36.8,63.2]", 50,
                                  ifelse(zone_y == "(63.2,78.9]", 70,
                                         ifelse(zone_y == "(78.9,100]", 90, NA))))))

  group_by(x, y) %>%
  summarise(avg_epv = sum(avg_epv, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(PEPV = 100*(round(avg_epv/HomeEPV1H,2)))  

EPVHeatMapplot1H <- EPVHeatMapData1H %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_opta, fill = "#E5E5E5", colour = "#454545") +
  theme_pitch() +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 21.1, yend = 21.1, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 36.8, yend = 36.8, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 63.2, yend = 63.2, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 78.9, yend = 78.9, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 17, xend = 17), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 33.2, xend = 33.2), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 50, xend = 50), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 66.4, xend = 66.4), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 83, xend = 83), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  
  # add zone percentage numbers
  geom_text(data = average_epvNZ1H, aes(x = x, y = y, label = paste(PEPV, "%")), size = 4) +
  
  #geometrics
  stat_density_2d_filled(aes(level = EPV, fill = after_stat(level)), alpha = 0.8, adjust = 0.1, linewidth = 2) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Home) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = "LFC Open Play EPV Heat Map - First Half", 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher \nEPV, Box figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  My_caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

EPVHeatMapplot1H


########################################################



```

``` {r}  
#Second half EPV Mao
#set time period
EPVHeatMapData2H <- EPVHeatMapData %>%
  filter(period == 2)

#set EPV total for time period
HomeEPV2H <- sum(EPVHeatMapData2H$EPVvalue)

# Create a new variable to represent the zone for each observation
EPVHeatMapData2H$zone_x <- cut(EPVHeatMapData2H$x, breaks = c(0, 17, 33.2, 50, 66.4, 83, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)
EPVHeatMapData2H$zone_y <- cut(EPVHeatMapData2H$y, breaks = c(0, 21.1, 36.8, 63.2, 78.9, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)

# Calculate average EPV for each zone
average_epv2H <- EPVHeatMapData2H %>%
  group_by(zone_x, zone_y) %>%
  summarize(avg_epv = sum(EPVvalue, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(avg_epv = round(ifelse(avg_epv < 0, abs(avg_epv), avg_epv), 3),
         PEPV = round(avg_epv/HomeEPV2H,3)) 

#calculate for combined tile and heat map
average_epvNZ2H <- average_epv2H %>%
  mutate(x = ifelse(zone_x == "[0,17]", 8.5,
                    ifelse(zone_x == "(17,33.2]", 25.1,
                           ifelse(zone_x == "(33.2,50]", 41.6,
                                  ifelse(zone_x == "(50,66.4]", 58.2,
                                         ifelse(zone_x == "(66.4,83]", 74.7,
                                                ifelse(zone_x == "(83,100]", 91.5, NA))))))) %>%
  mutate(y = ifelse(zone_y == "[0,21.1]", 10,
                    ifelse(zone_y == "(21.1,36.8]", 30,
                           ifelse(zone_y == "(36.8,63.2]", 50,
                                  ifelse(zone_y == "(63.2,78.9]", 70,
                                         ifelse(zone_y == "(78.9,100]", 90, NA))))))

average_epvNZ2H <- average_epvNZ2H %>%
  group_by(x, y) %>%
  summarise(avg_epv = sum(avg_epv, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(PEPV = 100*(round(avg_epv/HomeEPV2H,2)))  

EPVHeatMapplot2H <- EPVHeatMapData2H %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_opta, fill = "#E5E5E5", colour = "#454545") +
  theme_pitch() +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 21.1, yend = 21.1, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 36.8, yend = 36.8, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 63.2, yend = 63.2, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 78.9, yend = 78.9, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 17, xend = 17), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 33.2, xend = 33.2), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 50, xend = 50), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 66.4, xend = 66.4), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 83, xend = 83), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  
  # add zone percentage numbers
  geom_text(data = average_epvNZ2H, aes(x = x, y = y, label = paste(PEPV, "%")), size = 4) +
  
  #geometrics
  stat_density_2d_filled(aes(level = EPV, fill = after_stat(level)), alpha = 0.8, adjust = 0.1, linewidth = 2) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Home) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = "LFC Open Play EPV Heat Map - Second Half", 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher \nEPV, Box figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  My_caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

EPVHeatMapplot2H

```

```{r}
#| output: false
#first half
#set for time period
OppoEPVHeatMapData1H <- OppoEPVHeatMapData %>%
  filter(period == 1)

#set EPV total for time period
OppoEPV1H <- sum(OppoEPVHeatMapData1H$EPVvalue)


# Create a new variable to represent the zone for each observation
OppoEPVHeatMapData1H$zone_x <- cut(OppoEPVHeatMapData1H$x, breaks = c(0, 17, 33.2, 50, 66.4, 83, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)
OppoEPVHeatMapData1H$zone_y <- cut(OppoEPVHeatMapData1H$y, breaks = c(0, 21.1, 36.8, 63.2, 78.9, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)

# Calculate average EPV for each zone
Oppoaverage_epv1H <- OppoEPVHeatMapData1H %>%
  group_by(zone_x, zone_y) %>%
  summarize(avg_epv = sum(EPVvalue, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(avg_epv = round(ifelse(avg_epv < 0, abs(avg_epv), avg_epv), 3),
         PEPV = round(avg_epv/OppoEPV1H,3)) 

# Plot the tile plot
OppoEPVMapplot1H <- Oppoaverage_epv1H %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = zone_x, y = zone_y, fill = avg_epv)) +
  theme_pitch() +
  
  #geometrics
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = PEPV, size = 3)) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_AwayC) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = paste(Match_Oppo," Open Play EPV Heat Map - 1st Half"), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher EPV, \nBox figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

#OppoEPVMapplot1H

#save tile Map plot

#calculate for combined tile and heat map
Oppoaverage_epvNZ1H <- Oppoaverage_epv1H %>%
  mutate(x = ifelse(zone_x == "[0,17]", 8.5,
                    ifelse(zone_x == "(17,33.2]", 25.1,
                           ifelse(zone_x == "(33.2,50]", 41.6,
                                  ifelse(zone_x == "(50,66.4]", 58.2,
                                         ifelse(zone_x == "(66.4,83]", 74.7,
                                                ifelse(zone_x == "(83,100]", 91.5, NA))))))) %>%
  mutate(y = ifelse(zone_y == "[0,21.1]", 10,
                    ifelse(zone_y == "(21.1,36.8]", 30,
                           ifelse(zone_y == "(36.8,63.2]", 50,
                                  ifelse(zone_y == "(63.2,78.9]", 70,
                                         ifelse(zone_y == "(78.9,100]", 90, NA))))))

Oppoaverage_epvNZ1H <- Oppoaverage_epvNZ1H %>%
  group_by(x, y) %>%
  summarise(avg_epv = sum(avg_epv, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(PEPV = 100*(round(avg_epv/OppoEPV1H,2)))
```

``` {r}
OppoEPVHeatMapplot1H <- OppoEPVHeatMapData1H %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_opta, fill = "#E5E5E5", colour = "#454545") +
  theme_pitch() +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 21.1, yend = 21.1, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 36.8, yend = 36.8, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 63.2, yend = 63.2, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 78.9, yend = 78.9, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 17, xend = 17), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 33.2, xend = 33.2), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 50, xend = 50), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 66.4, xend = 66.4), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 83, xend = 83), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  
  # add zone percentage numbers
  geom_text(data = Oppoaverage_epvNZ1H, aes(x = x, y = y, label = paste(PEPV, "%")), size = 4) +
  
  #geometrics
  stat_density_2d_filled(aes(level = EPV, fill = after_stat(level)), alpha = 0.8, adjust = 0.1, linewidth = 2) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Away) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = paste(Match_Oppo," Open Play EPV Heat Map - 1st Half"), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher \nEPV, Box figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  My_caption) +

        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
```

``` {r}
######################################################################
#Second half
#set for time period
OppoEPVHeatMapData2H <- OppoEPVHeatMapData %>%
  filter(period == 2)

#set EPV total for time period
OppoEPV2H <- sum(OppoEPVHeatMapData2H$EPVvalue)


# Create a new variable to represent the zone for each observation
OppoEPVHeatMapData2H$zone_x <- cut(OppoEPVHeatMapData2H$x, breaks = c(0, 17, 33.2, 50, 66.4, 83, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)
OppoEPVHeatMapData2H$zone_y <- cut(OppoEPVHeatMapData2H$y, breaks = c(0, 21.1, 36.8, 63.2, 78.9, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)

# Calculate average EPV for each zone
Oppoaverage_epv2H <- OppoEPVHeatMapData2H %>%
  group_by(zone_x, zone_y) %>%
  summarize(avg_epv = sum(EPVvalue, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(avg_epv = round(ifelse(avg_epv < 0, abs(avg_epv), avg_epv), 3),
         PEPV = round(avg_epv/OppoEPV2H,3)) 

# Plot the tile plot
OppoEPVMapplot2H <- Oppoaverage_epv2H %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = zone_x, y = zone_y, fill = avg_epv)) +
  theme_pitch() +
  
  #geometrics
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = PEPV, size = 3)) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_AwayC) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = paste(Match_Oppo," Open Play EPV Heat Map - 2nd Half"), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher EPV, \nBox figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

#OppoEPVMapplot2H


#calculate for combined tile and heat map
Oppoaverage_epvNZ2H <- Oppoaverage_epv2H %>%
  mutate(x = ifelse(zone_x == "[0,17]", 8.5,
                    ifelse(zone_x == "(17,33.2]", 25.1,
                           ifelse(zone_x == "(33.2,50]", 41.6,
                                  ifelse(zone_x == "(50,66.4]", 58.2,
                                         ifelse(zone_x == "(66.4,83]", 74.7,
                                                ifelse(zone_x == "(83,100]", 91.5, NA))))))) %>%
  mutate(y = ifelse(zone_y == "[0,21.1]", 10,
                    ifelse(zone_y == "(21.1,36.8]", 30,
                           ifelse(zone_y == "(36.8,63.2]", 50,
                                  ifelse(zone_y == "(63.2,78.9]", 70,
                                         ifelse(zone_y == "(78.9,100]", 90, NA))))))

Oppoaverage_epvNZ2H <- Oppoaverage_epvNZ2H %>%
  group_by(x, y) %>%
  summarise(avg_epv = sum(avg_epv, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(PEPV = 100*(round(avg_epv/OppoEPV2H,2)))
```

# xG Analysis

## Row 1 

``` {r}

# Line Plot
  
xGLinePlot <- dashboard_data %>%
  ggplot() +
  
  #Geometrics
  #xg line
  geom_line(aes(x = expandedMinute, y = TotalxG), linewidth = 2, colour = Color_LFC) +
  
  #npXg line
  geom_line(aes(x = expandedMinute, y = TotalNPxG), linewidth = 1, colour = Color_LFC, linetype = "dashed") +
  
  #xGOT line
  geom_line(aes(x = expandedMinute, y = TotalxGOT), linewidth = 1, colour = "ivory4") +
  
  #Half time marker
#  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = max(TotalxG), x = 45, xend = 45), linewidth = 0.8, colour = "black", linetype = "longdash") +
#  geom_text(aes(x = 45, y = max(TotalxG), label = "HT"), colour = "black", vjust = -1, size = 4) +
  
  #add ball imae for goals
  geom_image(inherit.aes = FALSE, mapping = aes(x = Goal_point_X, y = Goal_point_Y, image = "~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/Icons/ball2.png"), size = 0.025) +
  geom_label_repel(aes(x = Goal_point_X, y = Goal_point_Y, label = paste0(type, " Min:", expandedMinute, "\nxG:", xG)), size = 3) +

  #formatting
  expand_limits(x = 0, y = 0) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 100), breaks = seq(0, 100, 15)) +
#  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, 15)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 8, 0.2)) +
  labs(x = "Match Time (mins)", 
       y = "xG, NPxG, xGOT",
       title = paste0(Match_LFC, " ", xGlineTitle_text),
       caption = My_caption,
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture))  +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_markdown(),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
        text = element_text(color = "gray12", family = "Arial"),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "#454545", linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dashed"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

xGLinePlot

#xGLinePlot_I <- ggplotly(xGLinePlot)
#xGLinePlot_I

```

```{r}
# Line Plot
#canvas
xGLinePlotOppo <- Oppodashboard_data %>%
  ggplot() +
  
  #Geometrics
  #plot xg line
  geom_line(aes(x = expandedMinute, y = TotalxG), linewidth = 2, colour = Color_Oppo) +
  
  #npXg line
  geom_line(aes(x = expandedMinute, y = TotalNPxG), linewidth = 1, colour = Color_Oppo, linetype = "dashed") +
  
  #xGOT line
  geom_line(aes(x = expandedMinute, y = TotalxGOT), linewidth = 1, colour = "ivory4") +
  
  #Half time marker
#  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = max(TotalxG), x = 45, xend = 45), linewidth = 0.8, colour = "black", linetype = "longdash") +
#  geom_text(aes(x = 45, y = max(TotalxG), label = "HT"), colour = "black", vjust = -1, size = 4) +
  
  #add ball image for goals
  geom_image(inherit.aes = FALSE, mapping = aes(x = Goal_point_X, y = Goal_point_Y, image = "~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/Icons/ball2.png"), size = 0.025) +
  geom_label_repel(aes(x = Goal_point_X, y = Goal_point_Y, label = paste0(type, " Min:", expandedMinute, "\nxG:", xG)), size = 3) +
  

  #formatting
  expand_limits(x = 0, y = 0) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 100), breaks = seq(0, 100, 15)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 8, 0.2)) +
  labs(x = "Match Time (mins)", 
       y = "xG, NPxG, xGOT",
       title = paste0(Match_Oppo, " ", OppoxGlineTitle_text), 
       caption = My_caption,
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture))  +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_markdown(),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
        text = element_text(color = "gray12", family = "Arial"),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "#454545", linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dashed"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
```

## Row 2

``` {r}
#Load data (opta Data)
dashboard_data <- plottingData

#Dashboard data wrangling all data
dashboard_data <- dashboard_data %>%
  filter(teamId == Match_LFC) %>%
  filter(TotalShots == 1) %>%
  filter(!Own_Goals == 1) %>%
  filter(!situation == "NA") %>%
  mutate(TotalxG = cumsum(xG)) %>%
  mutate(TotalNPxG = cumsum(NPxG)) %>%
  mutate(TotalxGOT = cumsum(xGOT)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_X = ifelse(str_detect(Goals, "1"), paste0(expandedMinute), NA)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_Y = ifelse(str_detect(Goals, "1"), paste0(TotalxG), NA)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_X = as.numeric(Goal_point_X)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_Y = as.numeric(Goal_point_Y)) %>%
  select(x, y, Goal_point_Y, Goal_point_X, TotalxG, TotalNPxG, TotalxGOT, situation, teamId, TotalShots, xG, NPxG, xGOT, expandedMinute, type)

#Dashboard plots
# Density Shot Map

#canvas
xGDensityPlot <- dashboard_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_opta, fill = "#E5E5E5", colour = "#454545") +
  theme_pitch() +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 21.1, yend = 21.1, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 36.8, yend = 36.8, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 63.2, yend = 63.2, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 78.9, yend = 78.9, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 17, xend = 17), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 33.2, xend = 33.2), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 50, xend = 50), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 66.4, xend = 66.4), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 83, xend = 83), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  
  # add zone numbers
  geom_text(aes(y = 50, x = 74.7, label = "14"), size = 3, color = "grey", show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(y = 71.05, x = 74.7, label = "LHS"), size = 3, color = "grey", show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(y = 28.95, x = 74.7, label = "RHS"), size = 3, color = "grey", show.legend = FALSE) +
  
  #geometrics
  stat_density_2d(aes(color = after_stat(level), fill = after_stat(level), text = paste("xG: ", ..level..)), geom = "polygon", alpha = 0.4, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_paletteer_c(ColorScale_HomeC) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_HomeC) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "xG Level")) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "xG Level")) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(0.5, 7)) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = paste0(Match_LFC," xG Density Areas"), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture),
       fill = "xG Level",
       color = "xG Level",
        caption = "Darker Colour + Tighter Lines = Higher xG") +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        panel.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        plot.caption =  element_text(colour = "black", size = 8),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

xGDensityPlot_I <- ggplotly(xGDensityPlot, tooltip = "text")
xGDensityPlot_I

```

``` {r}
#Oppo dashboard
#Load data (Understat Data)
Oppodashboard_data <- plottingData

Oppodashboard_data <- Oppodashboard_data %>%
  filter(teamId == Match_Oppo) %>%
  filter(TotalShots == 1) %>%
  filter(!Own_Goals == 1) %>%
  filter(!situation == "NA") %>%
  mutate(TotalxG = cumsum(xG)) %>%
  mutate(TotalNPxG = cumsum(NPxG)) %>%
  mutate(TotalxGOT = cumsum(xGOT)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_X = ifelse(str_detect(Goals, "1"), paste0(expandedMinute), NA)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_Y = ifelse(str_detect(Goals, "1"), paste0(TotalxG), NA)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_X = as.numeric(Goal_point_X)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_Y = as.numeric(Goal_point_Y)) %>%
  select(x, y, Goal_point_Y, Goal_point_X, TotalxG, TotalNPxG, TotalxGOT, situation, teamId, TotalShots, xG, NPxG, xGOT, expandedMinute, type)


#Dashboard plots
# Density Shot Map

#canvas
xGDensityPlotOppo <- Oppodashboard_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_opta, fill = "#E5E5E5", colour = "#454545") +
  theme_pitch() +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 21.1, yend = 21.1, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 36.8, yend = 36.8, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 63.2, yend = 63.2, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 78.9, yend = 78.9, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 17, xend = 17), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 33.2, xend = 33.2), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 50, xend = 50), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 66.4, xend = 66.4), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 83, xend = 83), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  
  # add zone numbers
  geom_text(aes(y = 50, x = 74.7, label = "14"), size = 3, color = "grey", show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(y = 71.05, x = 74.7, label = "LHS"), size = 3, color = "grey", show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(y = 28.95, x = 74.7, label = "RHS"), size = 3, color = "grey", show.legend = FALSE) +
   
  #geometrics
    stat_density_2d(aes(color = after_stat(level), fill = after_stat(level), text = paste("xG: ", ..level..)), geom = "polygon", alpha = 0.4, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_paletteer_c(ColorScale_AwayC) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_AwayC) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "xG Level")) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "xG Level")) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(0.5, 7)) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = paste0(Match_Oppo," xG Density Areas"), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture),
       caption = "Darker Colour + Tighter Lines = Higher xG") +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        panel.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        plot.caption =  element_text(colour = "black", size = 8),
        legend.position = "bottom", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

xGDensityPlotOppo_I <- ggplotly(xGDensityPlotOppo, tooltip = "text")
xGDensityPlotOppo_I
```



## Row 3

``` {r}
ShotBubblexG_data <- plottingData 

ShotBubblexG_data <- ShotBubblexG_data %>%
  filter(teamId == Match_LFC)

ShotBubblexG_data <- ShotBubblexG_data %>%
group_by(expandedMinute, Game_Period) %>%
  summarize(
    Attempted_Passes = sum(Attempted_Passes),
    Touches = sum(Touches),
    OFShots = sum(OFShots),
    OTShots = sum(OTShots),
    Goals = sum(Goals),
    xG = sum(xG),
    EPV = sum(EPV),
    TotalShots = sum(TotalShots),) %>%
  filter(OFShots > 0 | OTShots > 0 | Goals > 0 )

xGBubblePlot_data <- ShotBubblexG_data %>% 
  select(Game_Period, expandedMinute, Attempted_Passes, Touches, OFShots, OTShots, Goals, xG, EPV)

xGBubblePlot_data <- xGBubblePlot_data %>%
  group_by(Game_Period) %>%
  mutate(xG = round(xG,2)) %>%
  mutate(EPV = round(EPV,2)) %>%
  summarize(
    Attempted_Passes = sum(Attempted_Passes),
    Touches = sum(Touches),
    OFShots = sum(OFShots),
    OTShots = sum(OTShots),
    Goals = sum(Goals),
    xG = sum(xG),
    EPV = sum(EPV),
    TotalShots = sum(OFShots + OTShots + Goals),
  )  

#set plot size range
sizeRange <- c(1, 10)

#load final data frame for plot
xGBubble_Plot <- xGBubblePlot_data %>%

  #Canvas
  ggplot(aes(x = Attempted_Passes, y = TotalShots)) +
  
  #geometrics
  #xG bubble
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Home, 1) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_HomeC, 1) +
  geom_point(aes(size = xG, fill = xG), shape = 21, colour = "black", stroke = 0.5, alpha = 0.9) +
  #EPV Bubble
  new_scale_fill() +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Home, 1) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_HomeC, 1) +
  geom_point(aes(size = EPV, fill = EPV), shape = 23, colour = "black", stroke = 0.5, alpha = 0.5) +
  #Labels
  new_scale_fill() +  
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Home, 1) +
  geom_label_repel(aes(x = Attempted_Passes, y = TotalShots, label = paste0("Time: ", Game_Period,"\nxG: ", xG, " EPV: ", EPV)), fill = "white", size = 2.5) +
  
  #Scale and limits
  scale_size(range = sizeRange) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), breaks = seq(0, 20, 5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 8), breaks = seq(0, 8, 1)) +
#  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(xGBubblePlot_data$TotalShots))) +


  #formatting
  labs(title = paste0(Match_LFC, " xG (Circles) & EPV (Diamonds) Production by Time Period"),
         subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture),
         caption = My_caption,
         x = "Passes",
         y = "Shots") +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "#454545", size = 0.4, linetype = "dashed"),
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_line(colour = "#454545", size = 0.4, linetype = "dashed"),
        panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "vertical",
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_blank())

xGBubble_Plot
```

``` {r}
OppoShotBubblexG_data <- plottingData 

OppoShotBubblexG_data <- OppoShotBubblexG_data %>%
  filter(teamId == Match_Oppo)

OppoShotBubblexG_data <- OppoShotBubblexG_data %>%
  group_by(expandedMinute, Game_Period) %>%
  summarize(
Attempted_Passes = sum(Attempted_Passes),
Touches = sum(Touches),
OFShots = sum(OFShots),
OTShots = sum(OTShots),
Goals = sum(Goals),
xG = sum(xG),
EPV = sum(EPV),
TotalShots = sum(TotalShots),) %>%
  filter(OFShots > 0 | OTShots > 0 | Goals > 0 )

xGOppoBubblePlot_data <- OppoShotBubblexG_data %>% 
  select(Game_Period, expandedMinute, Attempted_Passes, Touches, OFShots, OTShots, Goals, xG, EPV)

xGOppoBubblePlot_data <- xGOppoBubblePlot_data %>%
  group_by(Game_Period) %>%
  mutate(xG = round(xG,2)) %>%
  mutate(EPV = round(EPV,2)) %>%
  summarize(
    Attempted_Passes = sum(Attempted_Passes),
    Touches = sum(Touches),
    OFShots = sum(OFShots),
    OTShots = sum(OTShots),
    Goals = sum(Goals),
    xG = sum(xG),
    EPV = sum(EPV),
    TotalShots = sum(OFShots + OTShots + Goals),) 


#set plot size range
sizeRange <- c(2, 9)

#load final data frame for plot
OppoxGBubble_Plot <- xGOppoBubblePlot_data %>%
  
  #Canvas
  ggplot(aes(x = Attempted_Passes, y = TotalShots, size = xG, tooltip = paste("xG:", xG, " EPV:", EPV) )) +
  
  #geometrics
  #xG bubble
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Away, 1) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_AwayC, 1) +
  geom_point_interactive(aes(size = xG, fill = xG), shape = 21, colour = "black", stroke = 0.5, alpha = 0.9) +
  #EPV Bubble
  new_scale_fill() +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Away, 1) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_AwayC, 1) +
  geom_point_interactive(aes(size = EPV, fill = EPV), shape = 23, colour = "black", stroke = 0.5, alpha = 0.5) +
  #Labels
  new_scale_fill() +  
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Away, 1) +
  geom_label_repel(aes(x = Attempted_Passes, y = TotalShots, label = paste0("Time: ", Game_Period,"\nxG: ", xG, " EPV: ", EPV)), fill = "white", size = 2.5) +
  
  #Scale and limits
  scale_size(range = sizeRange) +
#  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, max(xGOppoBubblePlot_data$Attempted_Passes))) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), breaks = seq(0, 20, 5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 8), breaks = seq(0, 8, 1)) +
  #scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(xGOppoBubblePlot_data$TotalShots))) +
  
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = paste0(Match_Oppo, " xG (Circle) & EPV (Diamond) Production by Time Period"),
         subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture),
         x = "Passes",
         y = "Shots",
         caption = My_caption
       ) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "#454545", size = 0.4, linetype = "dashed"),
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_line(colour = "#454545", size = 0.4, linetype = "dashed"),
        panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "vertical",
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_blank())

OppoxGBubble_Plot
```

``` {r}
# Bar Plot

xGSituationBarData <- dashboard_data %>%
    group_by(situation) %>%
  summarize(
    xG = sum(xG))
  
  #canvas
xGSituationBar <- xGSituationBarData %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = xG, y = situation)) +
  
  #Geometrics
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = Color_LFC, colour = Color_LFC) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(y = "", 
       x = "xG",
       title = paste0(Match_LFC," xG Creation By Situation"), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture)) +

        panel.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 12),

        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),

        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),

        panel.grid.minor = element_line(colour = "#454545", linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dashed"))
```
